svg.title: AutoFill document intelligence pipeline
svg.desc: End-to-end pipeline from any document type through extraction, semantic chunking, LLM classification, and canonical field mapping for autofill

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What document types does the AutoFill ingest layer support?')
g.text: PDF · DOCX · image scans · CSV · TXT

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the AutoFill pipeline detect document type before chunking?')
g.text: Heuristic + LLM: resume · thesis · marksheet · etc

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does semantic chunking work for different document types in AutoFill?')
sendPrompt('How does rule-based chunk classification and scoring work in AutoFill?')
sendPrompt('Write me the LLM batch review prompt for the AutoFill document intelligence pipeline')
sendPrompt('What entities does the AutoFill pipeline extract per category type?')
g.text: Per-category schema: names · dates · grades · DOIs

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the canonical field resolver work in AutoFill — give me the field mapping design')
sendPrompt('How does Weaviate storage work in the AutoFill pipeline — what metadata is stored?')
sendPrompt('How does the autofill retrieval query work at form-fill time?')
g.text: form field → semantic query → ranked fill
